command:
cd /Users/jmagady/Dev/vsdd-factory
echo "=== Verify the file's stale refs are gone ==="
grep -c "session-learning\.sh\|handoff-validator\.sh\|track-agent-stop\.sh" plugins/vsdd-factory/hooks/hooks.json
echo "(0 = clean)"
echo ""
echo "=== Verify .gitignore no longer excludes it ==="
git check-ignore plugins/vsdd-factory/hooks/hooks.json 2>&1
echo "(empty = no longer ignored)"
echo ""
echo "=== Stage + commit ==="
git status --short
git add plugins/vsdd-factory/hooks/hooks.json .gitignore
git diff --cached --stat
echo ""
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(hooks): re-track hooks.json with corrected refs (rc.7 hotfix #2)

11 bats suites assert against plugins/vsdd-factory/hooks/hooks.json
(checking that specific hooks are wired in). The rc.7 commit ed22928
untracked this file per S-0.4 design, breaking all those tests in CI:

  not ok 17 convergence-tracker: hooks.json wires convergence-tracker
  not ok 42 corpus-lint: hooks.json wires validate-table-cell-count
  ... (11 suites total failing)

Re-tracks the file so tests pass. Removes the 3 stale .sh references
that originally motivated the untrack:

  - session-learning.sh    (Stop)         → replaced with dispatcher
  - handoff-validator.sh   (SubagentStop) → replaced with dispatcher
  - track-agent-stop.sh    (SubagentStop) → replaced with dispatcher

For Stop and SubagentStop, those .sh files were deleted in S-8.x
when their logic was ported to native WASM. Replaced their entries
with the canonical dispatcher pattern (matches the per-platform
variants).

S-0.4 design intent (hooks.json is per-machine) is now a known
violation, tracked as follow-up: migrate the 11 test suites to
assert against hooks-registry.toml (the actual source of truth)
and then re-untrack hooks.json.

Updated .gitignore comment to document why hooks.json is now tracked
again despite the S-0.4 directive.

EOF
)"
git log --oneline -3
echo ""
echo "=== Push to main ==="
git push origin main 2>&1 | tail -3

command:
grep -nE "<<<<<<< |======= |>>>>>>> " CHANGELOG.md
echo "---merge commit:"
git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m "merge: sync main → develop after v1.0.0-rc.11 bundle (CHANGELOG conflict resolved)" 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "---push:"
git push origin develop 2>&1 | tail -3

git push origin develop 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "---verify final state:"
echo ""
echo "=== Tag points at: ==="
git rev-parse v1.0.0-rc.11 | cut -c1-12
echo ""
echo "=== GitHub Release ==="
gh release view v1.0.0-rc.11 --json name,tagName,createdAt 2>&1 | jq
echo ""
echo "=== Marketplace PR ==="
gh pr list --repo drbothen/claude-mp --state open --search "vsdd-factory rc.11" --json number,title 2>&1 | jq
